description_long: This chest of drawers features a minimalist, modern design with a rectangular form and clean, flat surfaces. The exterior is finished in a muted taupe or light gray color, giving it a neutral and contemporary appearance suitable for urban environments. The front face is divided into four horizontal sections, each representing a drawer, with no visible handles, suggesting a push-to-open mechanism or recessed grips. The chest stands on slender, metallic legs that elevate it slightly above the ground, adding to its sleek profile and providing stability. The sides and back are plain, with no additional ornamentation or features. The overall construction appears to be a combination of engineered wood or laminate for the body and metal for the legs.
description: A modern, taupe-colored chest of drawers with four handle-less drawers and slim metal legs, featuring a clean and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing four horizontal drawers with no visible handles and slim metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, flat side panel and the depth of the chest, with metal legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a featureless back panel and the supporting metal legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain side and metal legs.
